name: S2: wire writable Subject Hub notes (onAddNote)
description: Subject Hub notes section is read-only because SubjectHub.tsx:115 passes `notes` and `canStudy` to SubjectHubNotesSection but omits `onAddNote`. SubjectHubNotesSection.tsx:65 gates the write UI on `canAddNote = canStudy && !!onAddNote`, so the input, mic, and empty-state add button never render in production. Completing this requires: (1) adding onAddNote to SubjectHubProps and passing it through SubjectHub.tsx to SubjectHubNotesSection; (2) a subject-scoped note creation path — the DB column topic_notes.topic_id is NOT NULL (migration 0014_young_ravenous.sql), so either a forward migration to make it nullable or a new API route POST /subjects/:subjectId/notes that stores without a topicId; (3) a useCreateHubNote hook; (4) wiring in SubjectHubRoute (index.tsx:220) to pass the mutation as onAddNote.
acceptanceCriteria:
1. SubjectHub.tsx exposes onAddNote?: (text: string) => void in SubjectHubProps and passes it to SubjectHubNotesSection.
2. SubjectHubNotesSection shows the add-note input, mic, and empty-state add button when canStudy=true AND onAddNote is wired (existing canAddNote gate, line 65).
3. A new API endpoint POST /subjects/:subjectId/notes accepts {content: string} with no topicId and persists to the notes store (requires migration or new table if topic_id stays NOT NULL).
4. SubjectHubRoute wires the new mutation as onAddNote; on success useSubjectNotes cache is invalidated so the new note appears without manual refresh.
5. Submitting blank/whitespace draft is a no-op (existing gate in SubjectHubNotesSection.tsx:68-74 preserved).
6. Regression test: SubjectHub.test.tsx asserts onAddNote propagation; SubjectHubRoute test asserts subject-hub-notes-add-row is visible when canStudy=true and mutation handler is wired.
riskImpact: Hub notes are the felt-knowing loop (Flow 1) capture point; without write access learners cannot record understanding between sessions, and the empty-state notes section appears as a dead-end for all canStudy users.
